title: Indulgent Yeasty American Cod Chowder
description: A creamy, yeasty cod chowder that feels like a cozy hug, with toasted sourdough crumbles and a touch of spice.
instructions: Heat butter in a large pot over medium heat until melted.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in chopped carrots and diced potatoes, cooking for 3 minutes.
Pour in heavy cream and whole milk, bring to a gentle simmer.
Add cod pieces, peas, and toasted sourdough crumbles to the pot.
Simmer gently for 10 minutes, until cod is opaque and potatoes are tender.
Season with salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper, adjusting to taste.
Serve hot, spooning in generous amounts of crumbled bread for extra thickness.
Allow the chowder to rest for 2 minutes before serving for optimal richness.
Enjoy each comforting spoonful of yeasty cod chowder.
Optional: garnish with fresh parsley or a drizzle of olive oil.
Repeat steps 1‑3 if you prefer a thicker texture.
